expected_outcome: Competent Django developer proficient in MVC/MVT patterns, ORM database modeling, admin panel configurations, and building RESTful APIs using Django REST Framework (DRF).

topics.name: Django Settings & Project structure
subtopics: Virtual environment and pip packages settings

phases.practice_schedule: 1.5 Hours daily setting up projects, mapping URL routes, and rendering templates.

mini_project.title: Corporate Portfolio Website
mini_project.description: Develop a multi-page marketing website with structured layouts, customizable about details, contact forms, and localized page templates.

phases.milestone: Mastered Django workspace files, URL routing maps, template inheritance models, and context variables.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing databases models, generating migrations, and querying databases using Django shell.

mini_project.title: Blog Publishing Engine
mini_project.description: A database system supporting Posts, Authors profiles, Comments mappings, and categories, complete with admin panel interfaces.

phases.milestone: Proficient in model structures, relationship mappings, database migrations, and configuring admin dashboard lists.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily scripting validation forms, registration forms, and checking authentication redirections.

mini_project.title: Private Notes Manager
mini_project.description: Create an application where registered users login, compose formatted notes, filter category types, and edit details.

phases.milestone: Able to handle user inputs safely, configure login credentials, and lock routes from public searches.

phases.practice_schedule: 2 Hours daily writing serializer models, exposing REST paths, and checking token permissions.

mini_project.title: Task Planner REST API
mini_project.description: Establish a DRF REST backend containing login endpoints, JWT/Token access permissions, and CRUD operations over task records.

phases.milestone: Equipped to convert Django architectures into RESTful API services, secure routes with tokens, and deploy static assets.

major_projects.title: Real-Estate Listing Portal with REST & UI
major_projects.description: Build a portal where agents register, post properties with images, search tags, map bookings, complete with DRF backend authentication API.
